who: medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 10-20 claims/month
offer: For medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 10-20 claims/month, high claim denials cause cash flow gaps. We automate resubmission queues instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
problem: High rate of claim denials causing delays in revenue cycle management.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing specialists
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach with demo video to specialists
Community forums where specialists share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of claim denial details and simple dashboard for tracking claim status on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
